allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[-3:] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in ['trades','equity_curve']}, indent=2\)\)")
